default.title: Update available
default.description: Version 3.2.1 is ready to install. Restart to apply.

variants.title: Info
variants.description: Your export has been queued and will be ready shortly.

variants.title: Success
variants.description: Changes saved successfully. All data is up to date.

variants.title: Warning
variants.description: Your session expires in 5 minutes. Save your work.

variants.title: Error
variants.description: Failed to connect. Check your connection and try again.

appearances.title: Solid
appearances.description: Filled status background, high-contrast inverse text.

appearances.title: Subtle
appearances.description: Muted tinted background with status-coloured border.

appearances.title: Outline
appearances.description: Surface-raised background with full status border.

appearances.title: Left accent
appearances.description: Tinted background with bold inline-start status bar.

sizes.title: Small
sizes.description: Reduced padding for dense notification stacks.

sizes.title: Medium
sizes.description: Default size with comfortable reading spacing.

dismissible.title: Dismissible
dismissible.description: Dismiss button visible on the trailing edge.

nonDismissible.title: Non-dismissible
nonDismissible.description: Consumer manages removal — no dismiss button rendered.

noIcon.title: No icon
noIcon.description: showIcon=false removes the leading status icon.

withProgress.title: With progress
withProgress.description: Auto-dismisses in 5 seconds with a countdown bar.

longTitle.title: A very long notification title that should truncate at the single-line overflow boundary

longDescription.title: Connection error
longDescription.description: Unable to reach the server. This may be caused by a network interruption, a firewall rule, or the server being temporarily unavailable. Please check your connection and try again in a few moments.

withActions.title: Unsaved changes
withActions.description: You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you leave this page.
